chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 407 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.5654/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5655/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.5656/2025 (R/Surety) 07.10.2025 Mr. Dhani Bux Mangnejo, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Altaf Hussain, Naseem, Tasleeem, Ajeeb, Hakim and Deedar were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 16.05.2025, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.40,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing six original special savings certificates of such amount. Thereafter, the bail application of accused was disposed of as not pressed by this Court vide order dated 22.09.2025 on account of accused having been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 04.09.2025, annexed with this application. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
